channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Judge blocks Justice Dept.'s request for Michigan voter data
item.description: A federal judge on Tuesday dismissed the Trump administration's lawsuit trying to get a look at Michigan's voter rolls, saying the Justice Department ...

item.title: China’s Monstrous Sentencing of Jimmy Lai
item.description: Foreign nations should think twice about flirting with Beijing as a reliable partner.

item.title: U.S. military strike against suspected drug vessel kills two, leaves one survivor
item.description: The U.S. military struck its 39th suspected drug-smuggling vessel on Monday, killing two people and leaving one survivor.

item.title: Docs: Director Of ‘Bipartisan’ Attorneys General Group Proposed An ‘Infiltration’ Of Trump’s 2016 Transition Team
item.description: 'If [Trump] does get elected president, no one will ever have to worry about me wanting to be in any meeting, ever, anywhere, with anyone associated w...

item.title: Here Are The Top 5 Takeaways From Georgia’s Suspect 2020 Election
item.description: The Election Oversight Group’s 250-page report points to incidents that appear to exceed election worker incompetence and 'clerical errors'.

item.title: Report: These Chinese Researchers At U.S. Universities Have CCP Ties
item.description: American academia and policymakers must strengthen vetting for J-1 and other visa applicants with ties to high-risk institutions or programs.

item.title: Canada’s Mark Carney Can’t Even Challenge American Hegemony Without American Help
item.description: Canada's brave new challenge to American military power requires American weapons and technical support.

item.title: Trump's immigration chiefs are set to testify in Congress following protester deaths
item.description: The heads of the agencies carrying out President Trump's mass deportation agenda will testify in Congress Tuesday and face questions over how they are...

item.title: The UAE Quietly Poured a Half-Billion Dollars into Trump’s Crypto Venture Four Days Before Inauguration
Vice President J.D. Vance visits the Armenian genocide memorial in Yerevan
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance on Tuesday visited a memorial to the estimated 1.5 million Armenians killed by Ottoman Turks in the early 20th century.

item.title: Successful Lawsuit Over Transgender Surgery Ends A Decades-Long Horror Story
item.description: The trans lie is imploding under the pressure of reality.

item.title: Why Canada Engaged China Ahead of the USMCA Review
item.description: The country’s trade deal with Beijing is risk-management under pressure, not a pivot away from the United States.

item.title: Sen. Susan Collins launches reelection bid in 'toss-up' Maine Senate race
item.description: Sen. Susan Collins said Tuesday she's running for a sixth term representing Maine, pitching herself as an independent problem-solver who wants to push...

item.title: Seattle Won the Super Bowl, but Its Economy Has Gone from Boom to Gloom
item.description: It’s time for Washington State’s voters to wake up to the dangers that progressive lawmakers pose.

item.title: Is Motiveless Political Violence Really on the Rise?
item.description: We must be able to call domestic political terrorism by its proper name.
